channel.title: What's New in China
channel.description: Field dispatches from the ground in China.

item.title: Kid's bedroom through French doors, teal walls, colorful ceiling light fixture. Desk chai…
item.description: Kid's bedroom through French doors, teal walls, colorful ceiling light fixture. Desk chair, unmade bed, and open wardrobe suggest a work in progress, not a showroom. Everyday domestic scene, not a product shot.
